instruction: Write a FreeMarker macro `statusBadge` that maps a `status` string to badge text and CSS modifier classes for open, in_progress, and closed. Unknown statuses use a neutral badge. Escape status-derived text.
code: <#-- Macro: statusBadge(status) --> <#macro statusBadge status> <#assign key = (status!"")?lower_case?replace(" ", "_")> <#if key == "open"> Open <#elseif key == "in_progress"> In progress <#elseif key == "closed"> Closed <#else> ${(status!"Unknown")?html}
